meta.prompt: Surgical refresh — register-as-launchd and register-as-systemd promoted from recipe to template-artifact; they ship in every scaffolded project and are no longer optional installs

title: Recipe Catalog
subtitle: Optional capabilities installed per project — core ships none of these
intro: Recipes are the optional layer of AppySentinel. Core ships slim (pino, ulid, zod only). Every recipe is pulled in by the install agent only when selected. A recipe owns its own dependencies.

recipes.name: orchestrator-ssh
recipes.summary: SSH multi-host orchestration via bash-over-stdin. Polls any number of remote machines without installing anything on them.
recipes.how: Pipes bash scripts via stdin to each host: `ssh host 'bash -s' < script.sh`. Collects identity, resources, tools, git repos, running apps, and more.

recipes.name: sql-diff-collector
recipes.status_label: Planned — new pattern, not yet in spec §7.1
recipes.summary: Poll a database by updated_at watermark, write changed records to a local JSON mirror. Two tiers: delta sync for tables with updated_at, full-pull for tables without.
recipes.how: Tier 1 tables: SELECT WHERE updated_at > $watermark. Tier 2 tables: full replace bounded by company_id. Writes per-entity JSON files + _manifest.json with watermarks.

recipes.name: poll-command
recipes.summary: Run a local shell command on a configurable pulse interval. Emit the stdout as a Signal payload.
recipes.how: Bun/Node spawn + interval timer. Configurable: command, args, interval, parse mode (raw/json/lines).

recipes.name: poll-http
recipes.summary: HTTP GET on a configurable pulse interval. Emit the response as a Signal payload.
recipes.how: fetch + interval timer. Configurable: url, headers, interval, parse mode.

recipes.name: watch-directory
recipes.summary: Emit a Signal for each file system event (create, change, delete) in a watched directory.
recipes.how: chokidar watcher wired to the SignalBus.

recipes.name: hook-receiver
recipes.summary: Inbound webhook listener. Receives POST requests and emits the body as a Signal payload.
recipes.how: Hono route + SignalBus emit. Optional secret validation.

recipes.name: snapshot-capture
recipes.summary: Combine signals from multiple collectors into a single structured point-in-time snapshot document.
recipes.how: Subscribes to the SignalBus, accumulates per-source results, writes the combined snapshot via atomic-write when the collection cycle completes.

recipes.name: api-expose
recipes.status_label: Planned — foundation per Anthropic API/CLI/MCP ladder
recipes.summary: HTTP REST interface via Hono. Exposes stored data and health endpoints to browser clients and non-agent consumers.
recipes.how: Hono on Bun.serve. Routes: GET /health, GET /signals, GET /snapshot, GET /status.
recipes.pilot: AppyRadar Sentinel (Baku app + hotel-live.html need this)

recipes.name: cli-expose
recipes.summary: Pipe-friendly CLI interface. Query the Sentinel from the terminal — compose with jq, grep, on-machine agent loops.
recipes.how: Commands: sentinel status, sentinel signals [--last N], sentinel snapshot. Output: JSON or human-readable.

recipes.name: mcp-expose
recipes.status_label: Planned — default surface for AI agent consumers
recipes.summary: MCP server. Exposes Sentinel data as MCP tools that AI agents can call natively.
recipes.how: MCP SDK server. Tools mirror the api-expose routes but shaped for agent consumption.
recipes.pilot: SS Data Query Sentinel (primary surface), AppyRadar Sentinel

recipes.name: jsonl-store
recipes.summary: Append-only JSONL file + companion index JSON. AngelEye and FliHub pattern.
recipes.how: SerialQueue + AtomicWrite. One JSONL file per signal kind. Index JSON tracks file positions for fast tail reads.

recipes.name: snapshot-store
recipes.summary: Single overwriting JSON file via atomic-write. AppyRadar pattern — the whole state is one document.
recipes.how: AtomicWrite on each collection cycle. Fast reads (single JSON.parse), no compaction needed.

recipes.name: event-normaliser
recipes.summary: Canonical Signal envelope normalisation. Ensures all emitted Signals conform to the full envelope schema before storage or delivery.
recipes.how: Middleware on the SignalBus. Zod validation + defaults injection (machine, sentinel_id, schema_version).

recipes.name: http-push
recipes.summary: Batched HTTP POST of signals to a remote endpoint. Retry with exponential backoff.
recipes.how: Queue + batch collector + fetch with retry logic. Configurable: endpoint, batch size, interval, auth header.

recipes.name: supabase-push
recipes.summary: Push signals to a Supabase table.
recipes.how: Supabase JS client upsert on each pulse. Configurable: table name, upsert key.

recipes.name: register-as-launchd
recipes.summary: macOS launchd plist. Registers the Sentinel to start at login and restart on crash. No longer a recipe — runs automatically via scripts/install-service.sh in every scaffolded project.
recipes.how: scripts/install-service.sh detects macOS, substitutes {{PROJECT_NAME}}, {{PROJECT_DIR}}, {{BUN_PATH}} into the plist, copies to ~/Library/LaunchAgents/, runs launchctl load.

recipes.name: register-as-systemd
recipes.summary: Linux systemd user service. No longer a recipe — runs automatically via scripts/install-service.sh in every scaffolded project.
recipes.how: scripts/install-service.sh detects Linux, substitutes placeholders into the .service file, copies to ~/.config/systemd/user/, runs systemctl --user enable + start.

recipes.name: register-as-pm2
recipes.summary: PM2 ecosystem file. Cross-platform fallback when OS-native supervision (launchd/systemd) is not available.
recipes.how: ecosystem.config.js wired to the Sentinel's entry point. pm2 start / pm2 save / pm2 startup.

recipes.name: register-as-docker
recipes.summary: Dockerfile + docker-compose. For containerised or cloud deployments where OS-native service management is not available.
recipes.how: Multi-stage Dockerfile (builder + runtime). compose file for local dev. Health check wired to GET /health.
